_comment: Klaviyo provider states for both Settings > Integrations (admin side) and the form builder Marketing panel. base admin-settings-integrations (chevron closed, Klaviyo Connected pill) was captured separately via klaviyo-base.json.

variants._comment: Klaviyo accordion expanded — shows the connected 'Sullie Eloso' account row + Add New Account button.
Add New Account clicked — connection form visible with empty API Key + Nickname inputs and the orange 'Connect to Klaviyo' button.
